cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Padma Prasad ji? I'm calling from St. Michael's Hospital.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Padma. Who's calling, please?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 15s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A hospital receptionist calls a person on a patient's contact list to inform them that their [FAMILY_MEMBER] has been admitted to the hospital. The call is purely informational, providing the room number and visiting hours, and does not ask for any payment.
